meta.description: Real-time polling and survey platform — create polls, collect responses, view live results with charts

pages.name: landing
pages.description: Marketing landing page — create a quick poll CTA, feature highlights, pricing

pages.name: dashboard
pages.description: User dashboard — list of polls created by the user, quick stats (total votes, active polls)

pages.name: poll-create
pages.description: Create a new poll — title, description, options, settings (multiple choice, expiry, public/private)

pages.name: poll-edit
pages.description: Edit a draft poll — title, options, expiry date, access settings

pages.name: poll-results
pages.description: Live results view — bar chart, vote count per option, participation rate, real-time updates via SSE

pages.name: poll-vote
pages.description: Public voting page — shows poll question + options, submit vote, see result after voting (if configured)

pages.name: admin-panel
pages.description: Admin panel — user list, poll moderation, system stats

fields.name: slug
fields.description: Custom URL slug — auto-generated if empty

forms.note: Options cannot be edited after first vote is cast

actions.label: Close Poll
actions.description: Closes poll early — no more votes accepted

actions.label: Copy Share Link
actions.description: Copies public voting URL to clipboard — no API call

assumptions: Email and password are the only auth method; no OAuth in v1
JWT access token (15min) + refresh token (7d) stored in httpOnly cookies
Email field is PII — data classification: Confidential
displayName field is PII — data classification: Confidential
No email storage beyond authentication — no marketing emails in v1
Vote deduplication: one vote per IP per poll for anonymous; one vote per user per poll for authenticated
Votes are immutable once cast — no vote changes allowed
Poll options cannot be modified after the first vote is recorded
Poll results are visible to the poll owner at all times; public results shown to voters only if poll.showResultsAfterVote = true
Real-time results via SSE (Server-Sent Events) — no WebSocket needed for one-way push
CORS: allowlist-based — only configured origins accepted
All auth endpoints rate-limited: 10 requests per minute per IP (argon2 is CPU-intensive)
Vote endpoint rate-limited: 30 requests per minute per IP to prevent ballot stuffing
Public vote page (/p/:slug) is accessible without auth; IP-based deduplication applied
Admin role assigned manually via database — no self-serve admin promotion
Structured JSON logging on all API routes; correlation ID injected via X-Request-Id header
Health check endpoints: GET /health/live and GET /health/ready
Deployment target: Render.com — Web Service (API) + managed PostgreSQL + Cron Job (cleanup)
